login_totp_description: Open your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code for {email}.

due_assignments: You have {count} assignments due this week
home_hero_description: Fojo keeps PGCC Vocational Support Services students organized — track tasks, book workshops, and never miss a deadline.
home_about_body: Fojo is the Vocational Support Services hub for PGCC students. Track tasks, manage deadlines, and stay connected to workshops and support in one place.
home_features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
home_features_subtitle: Built specifically for VSS students at PGCC — simple, focused, and always available.
home_feature_task_management_body: Create tasks, set due dates, and mark them complete. Overdue items surface automatically so nothing slips through.
home_feature_calendar_body: A built-in calendar shows exactly which days have tasks due, so you can plan your week at a glance.
home_feature_workshops_body: Browse and register for VSS workshops directly through Fojo — no need to hunt through emails or flyers.
home_feature_secure_body: Sign in with your PGCC email using secure magic links. Your data stays yours — no ads, no tracking.
home_feature_pgcc_body: Designed hand-in-hand with Vocational Support Services staff to match how students and counselors actually work.
home_feature_improving_body: Fojo is actively developed. New features — like assignment sync and advisor messaging — are on the way.
home_how_step1_title: Sign in with your PGCC email
home_how_step1_body: Use your @pgcc.edu address. No password required — we send a secure magic link to your inbox.
home_how_step2_body: Create tasks from the dashboard, set due dates, and let Fojo surface what needs attention today.
home_how_step3_body: Check your dashboard each morning. Overdue items, today's tasks, and upcoming work are all front and center.
home_cta_body: Join your fellow VSS students on Fojo and take control of your academic workload today.
workshops_page_meta: Browse and register for upcoming VSS workshops at PGCC.
workshop_resume_description: Learn how to build a professional resume from scratch. We'll cover formatting, action verbs, and tailoring your resume for specific jobs.
workshop_interview_description: Practice common interview questions, learn body language tips, and build confidence for your next job interview.
workshop_study_description: Discover study techniques that actually work — spaced repetition, active recall, and time-blocking for busy schedules.
workshop_financial_description: Understand budgeting, saving, credit scores, and financial aid. Practical tools you can start using right away.
workshop_advocacy_description: Learn how to communicate your needs to instructors, request accommodations, and navigate campus resources effectively.
workshop_computer_description: Get comfortable with email, word processing, spreadsheets, and the online tools you'll use throughout your courses.
workshop_info_title: Can't find what you're looking for?
workshop_info_body: New workshops are added throughout the semester. Contact your VSS counselor or email vss@pgcc.edu to suggest a topic.
settings_subtitle: Manage your profile and security preferences.
settings_email_hint: Your email is tied to your PGCC account and cannot be changed here.
settings_passkeys_description: Add passkeys for additional devices so you can sign in anywhere.
settings_passkeys_verify_failed: Passkey verification failed. Please try again.
settings_passkeys_cancelled_or_failed: Passkey registration was cancelled or failed.
settings_totp_description: Sign-in security is managed through your PGCC email magic links in Auth0.
settings_totp_dialog_description: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm the change.
settings_totp_success_body: Your new authenticator secret is now active. All other sessions have been signed out.
settings_canvas_description: Connect your Canvas account to automatically sync assignments as tasks.
settings_canvas_url_hint: The URL of your school's Canvas instance.
settings_canvas_token_hint: Generate a token in Canvas under Account → Settings → New Access Token.
settings_canvas_connect_success: Canvas connected successfully! Your assignments will sync automatically.
settings_canvas_disconnect_success: Canvas disconnected. Your synced tasks have been kept.
